推荐场景: 访谈镜头前｜用例子支撑观点
60秒任务: 「举例说明」：问题/观点/例子/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 访谈｜观点展开｜例证｜反方观点｜总结｜态度识别
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let me give you an example.（引出例子）
A good example would be ___.（给例子）
For instance, ___.（举例）
To make that more concrete, ___.（具体化）
This happened when ___.（叙述场景）
Imagine a situation where ___.（假设场景）
That shows why ___ matters.（连接意义）
The example isn’t perfect, but it helps explain ___.（限定例子）
You can see this in ___.（指向场域）
One case that comes to mind is ___.（想到案例）
The point is not ___; it’s ___.（抽象出重点）
This is similar to ___.（类比）
That’s a small example of a bigger problem.（小例子大问题）
It helps listeners understand the impact.（说明听众价值）
Let’s connect the example back to the main point.（回到主旨）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: example, case, situation, impact, listener, main point, problem, comparison
Verbs: illustrate, explain, show, connect, imagine, happen, understand, compare
Adjectives / Tone: concrete, typical, small, bigger, similar, imperfect
Time / Place: for instance, in daily life, in schools, at work, in the story
Chunks: make it concrete, comes to mind, bigger problem, main point, not perfect
